Abies balsamea is a coniferous evergreen tree native to eastern North America, valued for its timber and resinous sap. The essential oil of Abies balsamea has been traditionally used to relieve respiratory issues and is also believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, providing relief for coughs, colds, and congestion.
